items.title: JACK OWEN Explains Why Butchered At Birth Is His Least Favorite Of The Early CANNIBAL CORPSE Records
items.summary: Owen pointed to 1991's Butchered At Birth as the record he'd consider re-recording, citing both production issues and the pressure surrounding its creation.
